title: Frontend CI/CD Integration
purpose: Add frontend build, lint, and E2E test jobs to the unified CI pipeline. Configure Vercel preview deployments for PRs.
architectural_constraints: Single CI pipeline for all surfaces
Frontend build must pass before merge
E2E tests require both frontend build AND backend integration tests

deliverables.description: Updated with frontend-build, frontend-unit-tests, frontend-e2e-tests jobs

acceptance_criteria: CI runs frontend-build on every PR
CI runs frontend-unit-tests on every PR
CI runs frontend-e2e-tests when both frontend and backend are ready
Vercel preview deployment succeeds for PRs
Failed frontend build blocks PR merge

failure_modes.scenario: Vercel preview fails due to missing env vars
failure_modes.mitigation: Document all required env vars in .env.example
Retry logic, stable test data, isolated test environment
